firstPartyCookies.name: __Host-fcr_session
firstPartyCookies.purpose: Hold the founder's Supabase access and refresh tokens for the same-origin server-rendered Control Room session.

firstPartyCookies.name: fcr_session
firstPartyCookies.purpose: Localhost-only development equivalent of the founder session cookie where Secure cookies cannot be used over plain HTTP.

forbidden: analytics, advertising, fingerprinting, or cross-site tracking cookies
client-readable founder access or refresh tokens
cached responses containing Set-Cookie or founder-specific content
cookies that authorize merge, deployment, migration, spending, or external communication
notes: Every request still validates the Supabase user and the private founder_users allowlist.
Bearer-token API access remains supported and does not depend on browser cookies.
Login authorizes access only; every consequential action keeps its separate founder approval gate.
